hero.greeting: Hi, my name is Diego Matheus
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Software Engineering student and Full Stack Developer with a solid foundation in solving problems within production environments. I focus on structured back-end development with Java (OOP, Design Patterns) and C/C++, combined with creating web and mobile interfaces using JavaScript, React, and Flutter. Extensive experience in SQL database administration, API integrations, log analysis, and technical troubleshooting.

projects.title: SICAPE - Alternative Penalties Management
projects.description: Solution designed for courts to mitigate fraud in signature and attendance control.

projects.title: Cache Memory Simulator
projects.description: Project focused on computer architecture and low-level programming for memory mapping simulation.

projects.title: Memory Game
projects.description: Implementation of a memory game with client-side logic and DOM manipulation.

items: Back-end: Java (OOP, Design Patterns, Data Structures), C/C++ and Python basics.
Front-end & Mobile: JavaScript, React, Dart, and Flutter framework.
Technical Analysis: Investigation of integration failures, production log reading, and webservices.
Testing & Quality: API route testing (Postman/JSON), bug reproduction, and structured documentation.
Database: SQL queries and data cross-referencing (PostgreSQL and MySQL) for incident resolution.
Infrastructure: Linux and Windows environments, local network configuration, and hardware pairing.
Systems & Versioning: Git, Jira, Zendesk, and Botmaker.
Processes: Ticket triaging, internal documentation, guide creation, and support-to-development interface.

experience.description: Reactive support for system usage. Diagnosis and correction of operational issues such as SEFAZ tax invoice rejections.
Moodle platform administration and Level 2 support. Application log analysis for data failure correction.
Interface between Support, DevOps, and Product. Integration testing with Postman (REST APIs) and MySQL queries.
Resolution of integration issues between the app and POS systems. Network and database failure diagnosis.
System maintenance via remote access. Network configuration and WhatsApp bot flow assistance.

education.description: High school integrated with Information Technology Technical Course

contact.subtitle: Let's talk
contact.description: Feel free to send me a message or connect through my social networks.
